content.text:
I've opened the SupplierSummary layout area for context. I can filter it to Ma Maison and show the categories they supply (or drill into the specific products).

Which would you like?
- Show categories Ma Maison supplies (summary view), or
- Show the full product list supplied by Ma Maison (detailed view), or
- Export a CSV of Ma Maison's products and categories (choose year: 2024 or 2025)?

Also tell me which year to use (2024 or 2025).
